'''sakongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yabby|yabby]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yabby|yabby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sakongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sækengeth|sækengeth]] || [[word:sækengej|sækengej]] || [[word:sækengesh|sækengesh]] || [[word:sækenge|sækenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakokongoth|sakokongoth]] || [[word:sakokongoj|sakokongoj]] || [[word:sakokongosh|sakokongosh]] || [[word:sakokongo|sakokongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakongoth|sakongoth]] || [[word:sakongoj|sakongoj]] || [[word:sakongosh|sakongosh]] || [[word:sakongo|sakongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakofngoth|sakofngoth]] || [[word:sakofngoj|sakofngoj]] || [[word:sakofngosh|sakofngosh]] || [[word:sakofngof|sakofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sakongotho|sakongotho]] || [[word:sakongojo|sakongojo]] || [[word:sakongosho|sakongosho]] || [[word:sakongoko|sakongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sakongoth|sakongoth]] || [[word:sakongoj|sakongoj]] || [[word:sakongosh|sakongosh]] || [[word:sakongo|sakongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sakongothol|sakongothol]] || [[word:sakongojol|sakongojol]] || [[word:sakongoshol|sakongoshol]] || [[word:sakongokol|sakongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sakongothotho|sakongothotho]] || [[word:sakongojojo|sakongojojo]] || [[word:sakongoshosho|sakongoshosho]] || [[word:sakongoko|sakongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sakongothon|sakongothon]] || [[word:sakongojon|sakongojon]] || [[word:sakongoshon|sakongoshon]] || [[word:sakongokon|sakongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sakongothoro|sakongothoro]] || [[word:sakongojoro|sakongojoro]] || [[word:sakongoshoro|sakongoshoro]] || [[word:sakongokoro|sakongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
